title: Entity Highlighter
description: Highlight nearby entities with a trigger.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ce62e0e1004dc32a73d9bf5d8dcaae194da5b49.png)

This data pack adds a trigger to highlight all or a group of mobs for 15 seconds in a radius of 128 blocks. This could be useful if you lost your pet, can't find your villagers or if you just want to find that one zombie under your house.

## List of commands
- `/trigger Highlight_All` - Highlight all nearby mobs.
- `/trigger Highlight_Pets` - Highlight all nearby wolfs, and cats.
- `/trigger Highlight_Villagers` - Highlight all nearby villagers and zombie villagers.
- `/trigger Highlight_FarmAnimals` - Highlight all nearby sheep, cows, chickens, and pigs.
- `/trigger Highlight_NightMobs` - Highlight nearby zombies, skeletons, spiders, endermen, creepers, slimes, and creakings.
